description:
Where walk_spec_for_discovery emits a target spec for a Direct /
ClosureLit / CallClosureKnown slot, look up the matching CallsiteId
in module.callsite_outcomes first. If Stalled, promote to
Emitted { target } in place (within callsite_outcomes); keep the
existing out.emits.push as a no-op shadow for now.

Behavior unchanged — this is structural plumbing.

## Acceptance

- After type_module on any fixture, every Stalled outcome with a
  slot in {Direct, ClosureLit, CallClosureKnown} has been promoted
  to Emitted.
- Goldens byte-identical.
- All 842 tests green.

## Removes

Nothing yet.
title: fz-CO.D.1 — Typer reads Stalled, promotes to Emitted
